store_headline: WordPress Portfolio Theme for Painters and Illustrators
store_subheadline: Showcase your portfolio, organize series with photo albums, and sell original work directly to collectors.
features: Portfolio custom post type with advanced filtering
Built with Elementor page builder for drag-and-drop editing
Wolf Core plugin with art-focused widgets and elements
Advanced animation effects for portfolio items
Beautiful image galleries with customizable layouts
One-click demo import with complete content
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
Content Blocks system for custom headers and footers
Advanced SEO optimization for better visibility
Multiple portfolio layout options (grid, masonry, metro)
selling_points: Sell original art directly to collectors — WooCommerce built in, no middleman required
Expressive collage-grid portfolio layout — the most painterly, fine-art-specific aesthetic in the catalog
Photo albums for organizing work by series, collection, or medium — the way painters actually think
Elementor-powered so you control every layout decision without writing a line of code
Distinct from Sable and Nu — Yor is built for painters, illustrators, and fine art professionals
Advanced portfolio animations make browsing your work feel like moving through a physical gallery
Collector-facing design vocabulary — the aesthetic signals a place to acquire serious art
Multiple portfolio layout options — grid, masonry, metro — let different bodies of work breathe
target_audience: Visual Artists and Mixed Media Creators
key_benefits: Sell original art directly to collectors — no gallery commission
Organize your body of work by series, medium, or collection
Build a collector-ready online gallery that commands serious buyer attention
Attract serious buyers with a painterly aesthetic that signals fine art
Launch a professional artist site with Elementor without a web designer
Convert visitors into buyers with WooCommerce listings showing medium, size, and edition
